TURTLEGMODELING.SPECIFICATION:
This coffee machine dispenses a beverage only after two coins have been deposited. If there's a substantial delay between (i.e., more than 30 seconds) the insertion of the first and second coins, the machine returns the initial coin. Likewise, if a beverage isn't selected promptly after the deposit of the two coins, both coins are automatically ejected. If either of the beverage buttons (tea or coffee) is pressed before the coins are ejected, the machine begins to prepare the selected drink. Notably, it takes 10 seconds to brew a coffee and 8 seconds to make a tea. Once the beverage has been collected, the machine is ready to accept new coins for the next order.
The user is represented as a Wallet that contains two coins when the system starts. The wallet takes between 20 and 40 seconds to insert a coin.
Use between 3 and 6 blocks.

textline.data: The availability of the machine shall be
A wallet must never contain a
The coffee machine never has one coin
inserted more than 50 units of time
When the application starts, if the wallet contains
at least 2 coins, then a beverage may be delivered.
On the contrary, if the wallet contains less than 2
coins, no beverage will be delivered by the

infoparam.name: UML Note
infoparam.value: CoffeeMachine featuring two main functions: - coin ejection - tea or coffee selection

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value:
A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2
A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1
F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin
CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion
- 97 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation = 10
- Our evaluation = 10 (both final model and mutation)
Remove unsupported cappuccino control/Structure: The model contains a CappuccinoButton part and related block, but the specification only defines two beverage choices: tea and coffee. This introduces an unsupported user control that is not present in the system specification.
How to solve? Remove the CappuccinoButton block and part from the CoffeeMachine composition, and keep only the TeaButton and CoffeeButton controls described in the specification.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram,CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine new components :
mutations: detach CappuccinoButton from CoffeeMachine remove block CappuccinoButton

Line.value: - Our evaluation = 10 (both final model and mutation)
Remove unsupported cappuccino control/Structure: The model contains a CappuccinoButton part and related block, but the specification only defines two beverage choices: tea and coffee.
This introduces an unsupported user control that is not present in the system specification.
How to solve? Remove the CappuccinoButton block and part from the CoffeeMachine composition, and keep only the TeaButton and CoffeeButton controls described in the specification.

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion
Actually, the suggestion detects and tackles an underspecification issue
- 126 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation = 5
- Our evaluation: - Final model = 8 (CappuccinoButton block remains, yet the model has been improved wrt the identified issue. Yet it remains two transitions to delete and two actions to add, which is easy to perform) - Mutation script = 8 (the deletion of two transitions are missing, and two actions are missing)
Preparation delay not modeled/Structure: The specification requires the machine to prepare coffee in 10 seconds and tea in 8 seconds after the corresponding button is pressed, but the model makes both beverages available immediately in CoffeeMachine without any distinct timed preparation behavior.
How to solve? Modify CoffeeMachine so that pressing the coffee button triggers a 10-second preparation before CoffeeDelivered, and pressing the tea button triggers an 8-second preparation before TeaDelivered. This can be modeled with dedicated preparation states or timed transitions.
Concerned views: CoffeeMachine
component: CoffeeMachine new components : CoffeePreparation,TeaPreparation mutations: add state PreparingCoffee in CoffeeMachine add state PreparingTea in CoffeeMachine add action on signal OnCoffeeButton in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton() add action on signal OnTeaButton in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to OnCoffeeButton add transition in CoffeeMachine from OnCoffeeButton to PreparingCoffee with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from PreparingCoffee to CoffeeDelivered after(10,10) add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to OnTeaButton add transition in CoffeeMachine from OnTeaButton to PreparingTea with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from PreparingTea to TeaDelivered after(8,8)

Line.value: Actually, the suggestion detects and tackles an underspecification issue
- Final model = 8 (CappuccinoButton block remains, yet the model has been improved wrt the identified issue.
Yet it remains two transitions to delete and two actions to add, which is easy to perform)
- Mutation script = 8 (the deletion of two transitions are missing, and two actions are missing)

The specification requires the machine to prepare coffee in 10 seconds and tea in 8 seconds after the corresponding button is pressed, but the model makes both beverages available immediately in CoffeeMachine without any distinct timed preparation behavior.
Modify CoffeeMachine so that pressing the coffee button triggers a 10-second preparation before CoffeeDelivered, and pressing the tea button triggers an 8-second preparation before TeaDelivered.
This can be modeled with dedicated preparation states or timed transitions.
add action on signal OnCoffeeButton in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton()
add action on signal OnTeaButton in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to OnCoffeeButton
add transition in CoffeeMachine from OnCoffeeButton to PreparingCoffee with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from PreparingCoffee to CoffeeDelivered after(10,10)
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to OnTeaButton
add transition in CoffeeMachine from OnTeaButton to PreparingTea with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from PreparingTea to TeaDelivered after(8,8)

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion
Actually, the suggestion detects and tackles an underspecification issue
- 147 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation = 4
- Our evaluation: - Final model = 8 (CappuccinoButton block remains, yet the model has been improved wrt the identified issue. Yet it remains two transitions to delete and two actions to add, which is easy to perform) - Mutation script = 8 (the deletion of two transitions are missing, and two actions are missing)
IncorrectBeveragePreparationTiming/Structure: The CoffeeMachine does not respect the specified beverage preparation times. After a coffee or tea button press, the model immediately marks the beverage as ready and transitions to delivery, whereas the specification requires 10 seconds to brew coffee and 8 seconds to make tea.
How to solve? Modify the CoffeeMachine state machine so that pressing the coffee button leads to a dedicated preparation state with a 10-second delay before delivery, and pressing the tea button leads to a dedicated preparation state with an 8-second delay before delivery. Only after these timed preparations should the beverage be considered ready.
Concerned views: CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine new components : CoffeePreparation,TeaPreparation
mutations: add state CoffeePreparation in CoffeeMachine add state TeaPreparation in CoffeeMachine add action on signal ReceiveCoffeeSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton() add action on signal ReceiveTeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveCoffeeSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveTeaSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveCoffeeSelection to CoffeePreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveTeaSelection to TeaPreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeePreparation to CoffeeDelivered with after(10,10) add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaPreparation to TeaDelivered with after(8,8)

Line.value: Actually, the suggestion detects and tackles an underspecification issue
- Final model = 8 (CappuccinoButton block remains, yet the model has been improved wrt the identified issue.
Yet it remains two transitions to delete and two actions to add, which is easy to perform)
- Mutation script = 8 (the deletion of two transitions are missing, and two actions are missing)
IncorrectBeveragePreparationTiming/Structure: The CoffeeMachine does not respect the specified beverage preparation times.

After a coffee or tea button press, the model immediately marks the beverage as ready and transitions to delivery, whereas the specification requires 10 seconds to brew coffee and 8 seconds to make tea.

How to solve? Modify the CoffeeMachine state machine so that pressing the coffee button leads to a dedicated preparation state with a 10-second delay before delivery, and pressing the tea button leads to a dedicated preparation state with an 8-second delay before delivery.
Only after these timed preparations should the beverage be considered ready.
add action on signal ReceiveCoffeeSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton()
add action on signal ReceiveTeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveCoffeeSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to ReceiveTeaSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveCoffeeSelection to CoffeePreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from ReceiveTeaSelection to TeaPreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeePreparation to CoffeeDelivered with after(10,10)
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaPreparation to TeaDelivered with after(8,8)

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion
- 65 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation = 10
- Our evaluation = 10 (both final model and mutation)
Remove CappuccinoButton/Structure: The model contains a CappuccinoButton part, but the specification defines only two beverage choices: tea and coffee. This extra element is not supported by the system specification.
How to solve? Remove the CappuccinoButton block and its part usage from CoffeeMachine, and keep only CoffeeButton and TeaButton as beverage selection elements.
Concerned views: BlockDiagram,CoffeeMachine component: CoffeeMachine new components :
mutations: detach CappuccinoButton from CoffeeMachine remove block CappuccinoButton

Line.value: - Our evaluation = 10 (both final model and mutation)
Remove CappuccinoButton/Structure: The model contains a CappuccinoButton part, but the specification defines only two beverage choices: tea and coffee.
This extra element is not supported by the system specification.
How to solve? Remove the CappuccinoButton block and its part usage from CoffeeMachine, and keep only CoffeeButton and TeaButton as beverage selection elements.

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3

UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion
- 176 seconds
- Semantic oracle evaluation = 6
- Our evaluation: - Final model = 9 (CappuccinoButton block remains, yet the model has been improved wrt the identified issue. Yet it remains two transitions to delete, which is easy to perform) - Mutation script = 9 (the deletion of two transitions are missing)
Add beverage preparation timing/Structure: The CoffeeMachine behavior does not model the preparation time required after beverage selection. According to the specification, coffee must take 10 seconds to brew and tea must take 8 seconds to prepare, but the current model goes directly from selection to delivery.
How to solve? Modify the CoffeeMachine state machine so that, after `pushCoffeeButton`, it enters a dedicated preparation state with an `after 10s` transition to `CoffeeDelivered`, and after `pushTeaButton`, it enters a dedicated preparation state with an `after 8s` transition to `TeaDelivered`.
Concerned views: CoffeeMachine
component: CoffeeMachine new components : CoffeePreparation,TeaPreparation mutations: add state CoffeePreparation in CoffeeMachine add state TeaPreparation in CoffeeMachine add action on signal PushCoffeeSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton() add action on signal PushTeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton() add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to PushCoffeeSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from PushCoffeeSelection to CoffeePreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeePreparation to CoffeeDelivered with after(10,10) and "beverageReady()" add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to PushTeaSelection add transition in CoffeeMachine from PushTeaSelection to TeaPreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0" add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaPreparation to TeaDelivered with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

Line.value: - Final model = 9 (CappuccinoButton block remains, yet the model has been improved wrt the identified issue.
Yet it remains two transitions to delete, which is easy to perform)
- Mutation script = 9 (the deletion of two transitions are missing)
The CoffeeMachine behavior does not model the preparation time required after beverage selection.
According to the specification, coffee must take 10 seconds to brew and tea must take 8 seconds to prepare, but the current model goes directly from selection to delivery.

Modify the CoffeeMachine state machine so that, after `pushCoffeeButton`, it enters a dedicated preparation state with an `after 10s` transition to `CoffeeDelivered`, and after `pushTeaButton`, it enters a dedicated preparation state with an `after 8s` transition to `TeaDelivered`.
add action on signal PushCoffeeSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushCoffeeButton()
add action on signal PushTeaSelection in CoffeeMachine with pushTeaButton()
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to PushCoffeeSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from PushCoffeeSelection to CoffeePreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from CoffeePreparation to CoffeeDelivered with after(10,10) and "beverageReady()"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from WaitingForSelection to PushTeaSelection
add transition in CoffeeMachine from PushTeaSelection to TeaPreparation with "nbOfCoins = 0"
add transition in CoffeeMachine from TeaPreparation to TeaDelivered with after(8,8) and "beverageReady()"

infoparam.name: UPPAAL Pragma
infoparam.value: A[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<=2 T E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>0 E<> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins>1 E[] CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins<3 A[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=0 E[] Wallet.nbOfCoins>=1 F CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered && CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered || CoffeeMachine.TeaDelivered CoffeeMachine.Beverage --> CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin F CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState CoffeeMachine.WaitingForFirstCoin --> CoffeeMachine.EjectState || CoffeeMachine.WaitingForSecondCoin CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<2 CoffeeMachine.CoffeeDelivered --> CoffeeMachine.nbOfCoins<3
